name: author-automations
description: Claude plugins for indie authors. Connect your Author Automations Social account and run everything through Claude — posts, campaigns, scheduling, book-anchored templates.

plugins.name: author-automations-social
plugins.description: Schedule social posts, run AI campaigns, and manage your content calendar across 15 platforms — Trial Reels, Threads chains, YouTube Shorts, the lot. Bundled remote MCP server (no install). Pairs with an Author Automations Social subscription.
